---
id: get-channels
title: 'Get /channels'
description: 'List all channels with pagination, filtering, and sorting.'
sidebar_label: 'Get /channels'
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: 'get api-method'
info_path: ads/api/reference/optiview-ads-api
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

import MethodEndpoint from '@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint';
import ParamsDetails from '@theme/ParamsDetails';
import RequestSchema from '@theme/RequestSchema';
import StatusCodes from '@theme/StatusCodes';
import OperationTabs from '@theme/OperationTabs';
import TabItem from '@theme/TabItem';
import Heading from '@theme/Heading';
import Translate from '@docusaurus/Translate';

<Heading as={'h1'} className={'openapi__heading'} children={'Get /channels'}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={'get'} path={'/api/v1/channels'} context={'endpoint'}></MethodEndpoint>

List all channels with pagination, filtering, and sorting.

<Heading id={'request'} as={'h2'} className={'openapi-tabs__heading'}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[
    {
      description: '1-based page number to return. Minimum 1.',
      in: 'query',
      name: 'page',
      required: false,
      schema: { default: 1, maximum: 9007199254740991, minimum: 1, type: 'integer' },
    },
    {
      description: 'Number of items to return per page, between 1 and 100.',
      in: 'query',
      name: 'pageSize',
      required: false,
      schema: { default: 20, maximum: 100, minimum: 1, type: 'integer' },
    },
    {
      description:
        'Optional RSQL filter expression (for example `status==READY;duration=gt=30`). Each resource exposes its own allow-list of filterable fields and operators.',
      in: 'query',
      name: 'filter',
      required: false,
      schema: { type: 'string' },
    },
    {
      description:
        'Optional comma-separated list of fields to sort by; prefix a field with `-` for descending order. Defaults to newest first (createdAt descending).',
      in: 'query',
      name: 'sort',
      required: false,
      schema: { type: 'string' },
    },
  ]}
></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema title={'Body'}></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  responses={{
    '200': {
      content: {
        'application/json': {
          schema: {
            additionalProperties: false,
            properties: {
              data: {
                description: 'The page of results.',
                items: {
                  additionalProperties: false,
                  properties: {
                    createdAt: { description: 'Timestamp when the channel was created, as an ISO 8601 datetime string.', type: 'string' },
                    customAssetKey: {
                      description: 'Google DAI custom asset key used for the server-guided (SGAI) path. Required for vendor pod breaks.',
                      type: 'string',
                    },
                    detectionEnabled: {
                      description:
                        'Whether automatic break detection runs for this channel. Read-only on create and update; toggle it via the detection enable/disable endpoints. Defaults to false.',
                      type: 'boolean',
                    },
                    dvrWindowMs: {
                      description:
                        'DVR (rewind) window in milliseconds, controlling how far back the platform looks for breaks to deliver to players. Defaults to 300000 (5 minutes) when not set.',
                      exclusiveMinimum: true,
                      maximum: 9007199254740991,
                      type: 'integer',
                    },
                    id: { description: 'Unique channel identifier.', type: 'string' },
                    liveOffsetMs: {
                      description:
                        'Live latency offset in milliseconds: how far the player live playhead trails real time on this channel. Break start times are evaluated against now minus this offset. Defaults to 0 (no offset).',
                      maximum: 9007199254740991,
                      minimum: 0,
                      type: 'integer',
                    },
                    name: { description: 'Human-readable display name for the channel.', type: 'string' },
                    pollingActiveSeconds: {
                      description:
                        'Break manifest polling interval in seconds advertised to players during an active break. Defaults to 1 when not set.',
                      exclusiveMinimum: true,
                      maximum: 9007199254740991,
                      type: 'integer',
                    },
                    pollingIdleSeconds: {
                      description:
                        'Break manifest polling interval in seconds advertised to players when no break is active. Defaults to 10 when not set.',
                      exclusiveMinimum: true,
                      maximum: 9007199254740991,
                      type: 'integer',
                    },
                    timebase: {
                      description:
                        'Time reference used for scheduling breaks on a channel: `wallclock` (ISO 8601 datetime) or `pts` (numeric presentation timestamp).',
                      enum: ['wallclock', 'pts'],
                      type: 'string',
                    },
                  },
                  required: ['id', 'timebase', 'detectionEnabled', 'createdAt'],
                  type: 'object',
                },
                type: 'array',
              },
              pagination: {
                additionalProperties: false,
                description: 'Pagination metadata for the result set.',
                properties: {
                  page: { description: 'Current 1-based page number.', type: 'number' },
                  pageSize: { description: 'Number of items requested per page.', type: 'number' },
                  total: { description: 'Total number of items matching the query across all pages.', type: 'number' },
                  totalPages: { description: 'Total number of pages available for the query.', type: 'number' },
                },
                required: ['page', 'pageSize', 'total', 'totalPages'],
                type: 'object',
              },
            },
            required: ['data', 'pagination'],
            type: 'object',
          },
        },
      },
      description: 'Default Response',
    },
  }}
></StatusCodes>
